executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
This app uses SvelteKit and is purely client-based using localStorage. Create End-to-End (E2E) test scenarios using Playwright to simulate user interactions on the DOM. Use `data-testid` attributes for targeting elements. 

Specifically, verify the following logic constraints:
- Risk Percentage > 5% must be rejected/blocked.
- Entry Price == Stop Loss Price must be rejected with a clear error message 'Invalid price distance'.
- All numerical inputs must not be negative.
- Successful calculations must be savable to the journal and persist in the Journal page.
- In the Journal page, ensure trade outcomes (Won/Lost) can be marked and entries can be deleted.
